loaderStrategy.notes: PostgreSQL COPY is implemented in the synthetic streaming fast-load path; DataScope keeps JDBC fallback when masking row-by-row.

MySQL LOAD DATA adapter. Native client not configured; approved runs use JDBC_MULTI_ROW.
